name: WLW | Sam Matthews - Butch Cowgirl
description:
Your dad owns a ranch and one of the farmhands might be sweet on you.

I made this bot for myself to use privately because i am SO nit-picky about wlw bots but I liked her so much I wanted to share!! J literally saw the above art and was struck with divine inspiration to make a butch cowgirl

Sorry i didn’t provide a picture of her face or anything! I refuse to figure out how to make ai art lmao

Valentines Day ALT

If you are a man and you leave a review joking about raping her or using this bot with a male persona, you will be blocked and your review removed.
